note: Four targeted fixes/additions, no consensus, no node, no miner. (1) WALLET FEE BUG: sendTransaction now uses a 3-pass converging fee loop just like sost-cli send. The previous estimate (148*min(N,10) + 34*2 + 10) ignored the capsule payload bytes entirely and capped the input count at 10, producing fee shortfalls of ~30% on capsule-heavy transactions and S8 consensus rejections (the user reported fee 15580 vs min 22369 = ratio 0.696). The new loop builds the signed tx, reads rawTx.length/2 as the authoritative size, and rebuilds with the corrected fee until size*feePerByte <= feeStocks (max 3 passes; refuses to broadcast if it cannot converge). Confirmation dialog now shows the SIGNED size and the capsule payload size. (2) EXPLORER MUTE BUTTON: the chiptune button never actually muted because the IIFE handler always called playRandomMelody. Now it tracks isPlaying state locally: click while playing -> stopMelody + nesToggleMute -> 🔇 muted; click while silent -> nesToggleMute (unmute) + playRandomMelody -> 🎮 active. Border colour reflects state. (3) LATEST TRANSACTIONS PAGER: same NEWEST/NEWER/OLDER/OLDEST controls the LATEST BLOCKS section already had, but for the TX table. 25 rows per page, page indicator in the table header. Filter buttons reset the page to 0. (4) PILLAR 3 SCARCITY (home): added the per-epoch detail (2.5029 yr/epoch = Feigenbaum alpha) and the asymptotic tail timeline (95% in ~30 yr, 99% ~45 yr, 99.9% ~70 yr, 99.99% ~91 yr, 99.999% ~115 yr) plus a one-line note that the 4,669,201 cap is an asymptotic limit, never strictly hit. Force-reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
